summary: Iteration 109: Frontend-only testing for Pet Soul Score fixes and Celebrations onboarding flow. All features verified successfully via UI testing.

verified_features.details: Progress indicator shows steps 1, 2, 3, 4 with checkmarks for completed steps
Shows 8 celebration types: Birthday, Gotcha Day, Vaccination Day, Grooming Day, Training Milestones, Adoption Anniversary, Festival Celebrations, First Year Milestones

verified_features.feature: Select Essentials and Select All buttons
verified_features.details: Both buttons visible and functional on Step 3 celebrations page, plus Clear button
Selected celebrations displayed as badges under pet info in review page
MyPets.jsx uses Math.min(100, ...) in 5 places to cap score display at 100%
Complete documentation exists at /app/memory/SCORING_LOGIC.md with weighted scoring system, tier system, paw points, and API endpoints
POST /api/admin/pets/recalculate-all-scores endpoint exists at line 7652 in server.py

test_credentials.note: No credentials needed - tested public onboarding flow

context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features working: 1) Onboarding has 4 steps (Parent Info -> Pet Info -> Celebrations -> Review & Pay), 2) Step 3 shows 8 celebration types with Select Essentials/Select All/Clear buttons, 3) Step 4 Review shows selected celebrations as badges, 4) MyPets.jsx caps scores at 100% using Math.min(), 5) SCORING_LOGIC.md documentation complete, 6) Backend recalculate-all-scores endpoint exists
